notes: Renogy restructured their Shopify catalog in 2025-2026. Many legacy Amazon kits (Wanderer/Adventurer/Rover combos) have been replaced with N-Type panel kits. Matches below use current Shopify products. Kits with no Shopify match: renogy-200w-starter-mppt-20a, renogy-300w-rv-kit, renogy-400w-bluetooth-kit.

mappings.match_notes: 100W 12V Solar Panel Kit with Wanderer 30A PWM. Exact product match.
200W 12V Starter Kit with Wanderer 30A PWM. Exact product match.

200W panel + 40A MPPT controller bundle. Shopify title is '200W Solar Panel with 40 Amp MPPT Charge Controller' vs Amazon 'Solar Kit with 40A MPPT Rover Controller + Z Brackets'. Same core components but Shopify may not include Z brackets.
200W 12V Essential RV Kit with Adventurer 30A PWM, Z brackets, cable entry housing, BT-1 module. Exact product match.
400W 12V Premium Kit with Rover 40A MPPT. 4x100W mono panels. Exact product match.

400W Starter Kit with 30A PWM controller. Amazon kit uses Wanderer PWM; Shopify uses Adventurer PWM (ADV30 in SKU). Both are 30A PWM but different controller models. N-Type panels vs original mono. Likely successor product.
400W Kit with Rover 40A MPPT (R40 in SKU). Amazon kit used 4x100W mono panels; Shopify variant uses 2x200W N-Type. Same wattage and controller class. Likely successor product.
600W 12V Kit with Rover 60A MPPT + Bluetooth. 3x200W panels. SKU R60 = Rover 60A, PB = Premium Bluetooth. Matches Amazon 600W Premium Kit with 60A MPPT Rover + Bluetooth.
800W 12V Starter Kit with Rover 60A MPPT + BT-1 Bluetooth module. 8x100W N-Type panels. Matches Amazon 800W 12V Premium Kit with 60A MPPT + Bluetooth.

Cabin Solution 1280W (4x320W panels + 9.6kWh battery + inverter). Amazon kit was 1000W Monocrystalline Solar Cabin Kit. Shopify product is 1280W with newer N-Type 320W panels - likely the successor/evolution of the 1000W cabin kit. Higher wattage but same product line.

Cabin Solution 2560W (8x320W panels + 19.2kWh battery). Amazon kit was 1800W Cabin Kit with 6x300W panels + Midnite MPPT. Shopify is 2560W with 8x320W N-Type panels - likely successor. Different wattage but same cabin-scale product tier.

unmatched_kits.kit_title: Renogy 200W 12V Monocrystalline Solar Starter Kit with 20A MPPT Rover Controller
unmatched_kits.reason: No Shopify product matches. The 200W starter on Shopify only includes Wanderer 30A PWM. No 20A MPPT Rover variant available.

unmatched_kits.kit_title: Renogy 300W 12V Monocrystalline RV Kit with 30A PWM Controller + Cable Entry Housing
unmatched_kits.reason: No 300W kit exists in Renogy Shopify store. Product likely discontinued.

unmatched_kits.kit_title: Renogy 400W 12V Solar Kit with 30A Controller + Bluetooth
unmatched_kits.reason: No direct match. Renogy restructured 400W kits into Starter (PWM) and Premium (MPPT) tiers. No standalone '400W + 30A + Bluetooth' variant exists.

unmatched_kits.kit_title: Renogy 400W 12V Monocrystalline RV Kit with Adventurer 30A PWM + Cable Entry Housing
unmatched_kits.reason: Shopify '400W 12V Essential Solar Panel Kit with DC-DC Assembly' (renogy-400w-12v-solar-rv-kit) uses a 50A DC-DC On-Board Battery Charger with MPPT instead of Adventurer 30A PWM. Fundamentally different product despite similar wattage.
